sourceFiles: auto_orchestrator_theory_txt_pack_v2/原文目录/06_执行中枢_控制反馈/38_可生存系统模型__Viable_System_Model/supplement_metaphorum_org.txt
fallback: Used book2skill plus skill-creator-style distillation because this runtime has no local cangjie skill available.

supplementalMetadata.reason: The assigned source identifies and summarizes the Viable System Model, but it is a scraped web supplement rather than a complete source text or formal bibliography, and it contains substantial cookie-banner noise. Minimal theory metadata and auto-orchestrator mapping were supplemented.
supplementalMetadata.domain: management cybernetics, recursive viable systems, organizational diagnosis, and autonomy/coherence design
autoOrchestratorMapping: System 1 maps to autonomous operational agent units or worker teams
System 2 maps to coordination mechanisms that dampen conflicts between operational units
System 3 maps to internal control, resource allocation, synergy, and inside-now optimization
System 3* maps to selective audit channels that verify operational reality
System 4 maps to outside-then intelligence, environmental scanning, experiments, and adaptation planning
System 5 maps to policy identity, values, escalation doctrine, and final closure
supplementalSources: Stafford Beer, Brain of the Firm
Stafford Beer, The Heart of Enterprise
Stafford Beer, Diagnosing the System for Organizations
